title: Sex education
blurb: Biology, psychology, and culture — woven together. A language for boundaries, desires, and needs, without shame.

testimonials.quote: [mock] My class asked more in that workshop than in a whole semester of biology.
[mock] The format wasn't awkward — students stayed with it the whole way. First time I've seen that.
[mock] After the workshop we had a new frame for talking about boundaries and consent. Signe gave us the language.
